# ROCm tools, compilers, and runtime API

# ROCm tools, compilers, and runtime API[\#](#rocm-tools-compilers-and-runtime-api "Link to this heading")

[ !(data:image/svg+xml;base64,) ] 2026-03-10

Applies to Linux

System Management

- [[AMD SMI]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/amdsmi/en/latest/index.html "(in AMD SMI v26.2.2)")

- [[ROCm Data Center Tool]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rdc/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCm Data Center tool)")

- [[rocminfo]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocminfo/en/latest/index.html "(in rocminfo v1.0.0)")

- [[ROCm SMI]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocm_smi_lib/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCm SMI LIB Documentation v7.8.0)")

- [[ROCm Validation Suite]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/ROCmValidationSuite/en/latest/index.html "(in RVS Documentation v1.3.0)")

Performance

- [[ROCm Bandwidth Test]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocm_bandwidth_test/en/latest/index.html "(in rocm_bandwidth_test)")

- [[ROCm Compute Profiler]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocprofiler-compute/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCm Compute Profiler v3.4.0)")

- [[ROCm Systems Profiler]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocprofiler-systems/en/latest/index.html "(in rocprofiler-systems v1.3.0)")

- [[ROCProfiler]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocprofiler/en/latest/index.html "(in rocprofiler Documentation v2.0.0)")

- [[ROCprofiler-SDK]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocprofiler-sdk/en/latest/index.html "(in Rocprofiler SDK v1.1.0)")

- [[ROCTracer]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/roctracer/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCTracer Documentation v4.1.0)")

Development

- [[ROCm CMake]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/ROCmCMakeBuildTools/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCm CMake Build Tools v0.14.0)")

- [[HIPIFY]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/HIPIFY/en/latest/index.html "(in HIPIFY Documentation)")

- [[ROCdbgapi]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/ROCdbgapi/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCdbgapi Documentation v0.77.4)")

- [[ROCm Debugger (ROCgdb)]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/ROCgdb/en/latest/index.html "(in ROCgdb Documentation v16.3)")

- [[ROCr Debug Agent]](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocr_debug_agent/en/latest/index.html "(in rocr_debug_agent v2.1.0)")

Compilers
